data.current_summary: Get a subscriber by ID or email
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single subscriber's details by their unique ID or email address. The subscriberId path parameter accepts either format. Returns a complete Subscriber object containing all subscriber information including email, name, custom fields, subscription status, and engagement metrics.
data.reasoning: Description is missing entirely. Added clarity about parameter flexibility (ID or email), what constitutes the response (complete Subscriber object with specific fields), and how to identify the subscriber to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'forgetSubscriber' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description lacks important context about irreversibility and the distinction from standard deletion. Added clarification about what data is deleted, the 30-day timeline, GDPR compliance context, and that it returns a confirmation. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus deleteSubscriber and what to expect.

data.current_description: Removes subscriber and completely deletes their information within 30 days.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a subscriber and schedules complete deletion of their personal information in compliance with GDPR requirements. All subscriber data including email, name, custom fields, and activity history will be deleted within 30 days. This operation is irreversible and differs from standard deletion which retains data for resubscription. Returns a confirmation response upon successful initiation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks important context about irreversibility and the distinction from standard deletion. Added clarification about what data is deleted, the 30-day timeline, GDPR compliance context, and that it returns a confirmation. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus deleteSubscriber and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve subscriber import status and report
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the status and detailed report of a subscriber import operation. Returns import progress, success/failure counts, and any error details for the specified import ID. Use this to monitor bulk subscriber import operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague and doesn't clarify what 'import report' refers to. Description is completely missing. Added context about subscriber imports, what data is returned, and the use case for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'createCampaign' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but description is missing. Added details about draft status, required input schema, return value, and the workflow requirement to schedule after creation for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new email campaign in draft status. Accepts campaign configuration including name, subject, content, and recipient groups via CreateCampaignRequest schema. Returns the created Campaign object with assigned ID. The campaign is created as a draft and must be scheduled separately to send.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is missing. Added details about draft status, required input schema, return value, and the workflow requirement to schedule after creation for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getCampaign' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about what campaign information is returned and clarified the required parameter for AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific campaign by ID. Returns the complete Campaign object including configuration, status, recipient count, and performance metrics. Use the campaignId path parameter to specify which campaign to retrieve.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added details about what campaign information is returned and clarified the required parameter for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'updateCampaign' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary indicates draft-only restriction but description is missing. Added important context about the draft-only constraint, what can be updated, return value, and immediate effect for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing draft campaign's configuration. Accepts campaign updates via CreateCampaignRequest schema. Only draft campaigns can be modified; scheduled or sent campaigns cannot be updated. Returns the updated Campaign object. Changes take effect immediately.
data.reasoning: Summary indicates draft-only restriction but description is missing. Added important context about the draft-only constraint, what can be updated, return value, and immediate effect for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteCampaign' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added critical context about draft-only deletion restriction, irreversibility, and what gets removed to help AI agents understand the destructive nature and constraints.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a campaign by ID. Only draft campaigns can be deleted; scheduled or sent campaigns cannot be removed. This action is irreversible and will remove all associated campaign data. Returns a success confirmation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added critical context about draft-only deletion restriction, irreversibility, and what gets removed to help AI agents understand the destructive nature and constraints.

message: Operation 'scheduleCampaign' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is ambiguous about 'or send'. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about draft requirement, scheduling parameters, return value, and the important side effect that scheduled campaigns become immutable for AI agent workflow understanding.

data.summary_suggestion: Schedule campaign for sending or send immediately
data.description_suggestion: Schedules a draft campaign for sending at a specified time or sends it immediately. Accepts scheduling parameters including send time and recipient groups. Campaign must be in draft status. Returns the updated Campaign object with new status. Once scheduled, the campaign cannot be modified.
data.reasoning: Summary is ambiguous about 'or send'. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about draft requirement, scheduling parameters, return value, and the important side effect that scheduled campaigns become immutable for AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_description: Removes subscriber and completely deletes their information within 30 days.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a subscriber and schedules complete deletion of their personal information in compliance with GDPR requirements. All subscriber data including email, name, custom fields, and activity history will be deleted within 30 days. This operation is irreversible and differs from standard deletion which retains data for resubscription. Returns a confirmation response upon successful initiation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks important context about irreversibility and the distinction from standard deletion. Added clarification about what data is deleted, the 30-day timeline, GDPR compliance context, and that it returns a confirmation. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation versus deleteSubscriber and what to expect.
